## [06:06 - 07:33]

But this is by far the most important thing. Grant is always harping on where's the trends? What's the trend? Where are we at? Are we up? Are we down? Up stat or down stat? And by creating these automated trend graphs, at any single day, we can look and go, oh, man, we're, for example, landing page visitors are down. Like, hey, where are we at here, guys? We're getting over 7,000 people to the page and it looks like we only got 5,000 today. Where are we? What's going on? And it just makes it so easy to visualize what's going on. Registration rate also down. All right, attendance rate, I mean, super strong. It looks like some of these attendance rate were over 70%. So having the trends is such a big deal. But above all else, if you've got KPIs and you've got trends and never forget beyond the dashboards, there's no numbers that are more important in a 10x company than always knowing what your targets are. So I can guarantee every single one of these numbers. This is like the most important number. What's our target today? We're going to get at least 5,000 people on. And Grant just pushes, pushes, pushes, pushes, pushes to hit those target numbers. And now it's your turn to go do it in your business.
